channel.title: History on Andre Walter
channel.description: Recent content in History on Andre Walter

item.title: HSG International Fellowship
item.description: I’ve got news that I have been awared with the International Postdoctoral Fellowship! This great opportunity allows me to conduct independent research for up to three years on a number of topics of my choosing at the University of St. Gallen. I planning to focus on two projects: The introduction of proportional representation I haven written a piece with Patrick Emmenegger on the introduction of PR for the election of the Swiss National Council (currently under review).

item.title: Swiss Cantonal Governments 1848-2017
item.description: I’m currently working with Patrick Emmenegger on creating a database on the ideological composition of cantonal governments. We were able to compile a time series for most cantons starting in the mid 19th century. A complete Time-Series Cross-Section is available for all cantons for 1894 onwards (except Appenzell Inner-Rhodes which starts 1928 and, of course, Jura in 1978). Below, you can find the first exploratory results. The first plot displays the smoothed government volatility for 24 cantons (excl.
